rulings.Case Title: JAMES ROBERT SOPRITO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Kaiser Ventures LLC¿s motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication on the issue of punitive damages is granted. On the issue of duty, defendant did not present any evidence on its actual knowledge and thus failed to satisfy its burden of production. One the issue of punitive damages, defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiffs did not present evidence creating a triable issue whether defendant acted with malice, fraud or oppression by clear and convincing evidence. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CATHLEEN DAVETAS VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION, LTD. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Paul & Hanley¿s motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiffs is denied as untimely. Paul & Hanley failed to provide additional days for mail service required by C.C.P. § 1005(b). = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Dow Chemical Company¿s demurrer to plaintiff¿s complaint is continued on the court¿s own motion to June 8, 2011 at 9:15 am in Department 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)
